verdicts.note: Evidence confirms product is 'Consensus' – both the research platform (consensus.app) and separate sales automation product (goconsensus.com) are mentioned.
Evidence confirms consensus.app is the academic research platform website.
Evidence shows Consensus is an AI research platform for academic literature search, fitting 'AI, Research and Media-native' category.

The one-liner incorrectly states 'enterprise-only API access requiring sales contact' as definitive. The agentsapis.com evidence says 'No free tier available for API access; enterprise accounts must contact Consensus directly for API key' but this is a third-party source. The official docs show a public v1/quick_search endpoint with x-api-key authentication. The MCP docs show OAuth and public accessibility. The evidence does not definitively prove enterprise-only restriction – it shows mixed signals.

Evidence confirms API Key authentication (GoConsensus uses API Key + Secret in request body; consensus.app research API uses x-api-key header) and OAuth 2.0 (for Salesforce integration and MCP server).

The evidence does not definitively confirm 'partnership-contact-sales' for consensus.app research API. The agentsapis.com claim about enterprise-only access is from a third-party source. Official docs show public endpoints but don't explain signup/access clearly. The GoConsensus API allows self-generation of credentials in account settings, suggesting possible self-serve.

The claim 'No free tier or self-serve developer API access for Consensus.app research API - restricted to enterprise accounts only' is supported only by third-party source (agentsapis.com), not official documentation. Official docs show public endpoints but don't clarify access tier.
Evidence confirms REST API with narrow scope. GoConsensus has endpoints for reports/user management; consensus.app research API has v1/quick_search endpoint documented.
Evidence confirms official Consensus MCP server exists at docs.consensus.app/docs/mcp with OAuth authentication and search capabilities.
URL https://docs.consensus.app/docs/mcp correctly points to official MCP documentation.

The 'buildable-with-caveats' rating and blocker about 'enterprise account and direct contact' are not definitively supported. Evidence shows public API endpoints and public MCP server with OAuth. The enterprise-only claim comes from third-party source. If API is publicly accessible via signup, buildability should be higher.
The blocker statement relies on the unverified enterprise-only claim from agentsapis.com. Official documentation shows public endpoints and MCP server, suggesting possible self-serve access.
All evidence URLs are valid and support the claims attributed to them in the record.
0.75 confidence is reasonable given the mix of official documentation and third-party claims, plus confusion between two separate Consensus products.

Flags are appropriate: existing-mcp-server is confirmed, enterprise-only-api and contact-sales-required reflect the agentsapis.com claim (though not definitively proven), dual-products-confusion is clearly evidenced.

revised.name: Consensus
revised.one_liner: AI academic research search engine with 200M+ peer-reviewed papers, offering API access and an official MCP server for research workflows.

auth_methods.notes: Research search API (consensus.app) uses x-api-key header authentication. GoConsensus API uses API Key + API Secret passed in request body along with user_email and source_name. GoConsensus credentials can be self-generated in Integrations section of account.
OAuth 2.0 used for Consensus MCP server authentication and for specific integrations like Salesforce connection (v11.10+).

revised.self_serve_notes: Access model unclear from official documentation. Third-party source (agentsapis.com) claims enterprise-only access requiring sales contact for consensus.app research API, but official docs show public v1/quick_search endpoint with x-api-key authentication and public MCP server with OAuth. GoConsensus API credentials can be self-generated within account Integrations section. Official signup/tier information not found in evidence.

api_surface.notes: Two distinct REST APIs: (1) GoConsensus (app.goconsensus.com) - sales automation platform with endpoints for reports, user management, and DemoBoard data; (2) Consensus.app - academic research search API with v1/quick_search endpoint supporting query parameters, filters (year, study type, journal, etc.), and pagination (enterprise customers). MCP server provides search and fetch tools via https://mcp.consensus.app/mcp.

evidence.supports: API Key + Secret authentication method for GoConsensus API, REST endpoints for reports/user management
API credentials can be generated in Integrations section of GoConsensus account
Research search API (v1) uses x-api-key header authentication, supports filters and pagination
Official Consensus MCP server exists at mcp.consensus.app/mcp with OAuth authentication, supports Claude Desktop, ChatGPT, Cursor, VS Code and other MCP clients
Third-party documentation describing Consensus research API use cases; claims no free tier and enterprise-only access (unverified by official sources)
